summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a great June ’76 run, featuring a sweet‑sounding set list.
review: The recording is praised as sounding great and sweet, indicating a high‑quality soundboard source with clear, balanced audio. Reviewers also note that the show sits nicely within a strong stretch of June 1976 performances and boasts a very nice set list, making it an enjoyable listening experience overall.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights both excellent performance and superb recording quality; with limited data the confidence is low but the sentiment suggests an exceptional show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as "great" and "sweet," indicating clear, well‑balanced sound with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set list is described as very nice and part of a strong run of June 1976 shows, suggesting smooth pacing and good song selection.
